description: Car trouble can be STRESSFUL, over paying SHOULDN’T be an option! Introducing Rays RoadSide Rewards — The easiest way to save money when your vehicle lets you down. It’s better to be prepared for unexpected emergencies! With that being said, go check out our website and select the package that best suits your needs. Feel free to reach out with any questions and as always thank you for supporting Rays 610 Towing! https://rays610towing.square.site

layoutDescription: Single-column story scroll: hero type-first (minimal photo), sections separated by generous padding and subtle background shifts; gallery as horizontal scroll strip.
mood: Reliable, local, ready when you need us — competent and direct
antiPatterns: No menu or reservation language. Phone must be tel: in header and hero. Sticky mobile call bar required. Industrial clarity beats decoration.
photoInventory: You will receive 12 real Facebook photos: hero = storefront/work sample, gallery slots = additional post photos. Design image areas as 16:9 or 4:3 placeholders.
